# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  adminUsername: string
  adminPassword: securestring
  osDiskSizeGB: int
  dataDiskCount: int
  dataDiskSizeGB: int

variables:
  vmNamePrefix: 'webvm'

resources:
  resources:
    - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
      apiVersion: 2021-03-01
      location: eastus
      name: '[concat(variables.vmNamePrefix), parameters('osDiskSizeGB'), (take( concat(repeat(parameters('dataDiskCount'), ''), "-"), 15))]'
      properties:
        osProfile:
          computerName: '[reference(resources, parameters('vmNamePrefix'), 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines').name]'
          adminUsername: '[parameters('adminUsername')]'
          adminPassword: '[parameters('adminPassword')]
        hardwareProfile:
          vmSize: Standard_D2s_v3
        storageProfile:
          imageReference:
            publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
            offer: WindowsServer
            sku: 2016-Datacenter
            version: latest
          osDisk:
            name: '[concat(variables.vmNamePrefix), parameters('osDiskSizeGB'), (take( concat(repeat(parameters('dataDiskCount'), ''), "-"), 15))]'
            caching: ReadWrite
            createOption: FromImage
            managedDisks:
              - id: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/disks', variables.vmNamePrefix, parameters('osDiskSizeGB'), (take( concat(repeat(parameters('dataDiskCount'), ''), "-"), 15)))]'
          dataDisks:
            - diskSizeGB: '[parameters('dataDiskSizeGB')]'
            - createOption: Empty
              lun: '[gridindex()-1]'
              caching: ReadWrite
              managedDisk:
                id: '[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Compute/disks/', concat(variables.vmNamePrefix, (take( concat(repeat(parameters('dataDiskCount'), ''), "-"), 15))) )]'
            - diskSizeGB: '[parameters('dataDiskSizeGB')]'
            - createOption: Empty
              lun: '[gridindex()-2]'
              caching: ReadWrite
              managedDisk:
                id: '[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Compute/disks/', concat(variables.vmNamePrefix, (take( concat(repeat(parameters('dataDiskCount'), ''), "-"), 15))) )]'

outputs:
  vmName:
    value: '[reference(resources, parameters('vmNamePrefix'), 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines').name]'
